common.error: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again.
common.no_permission: ❌ You don't have permission to execute this command.
common.not_setup: ❌ This server hasn't been configured. An admin must run `/setup`.
common.not_citizen: ❌ You're not a citizen of this nation. Use `/registro` to register.
common.target_not_citizen: ❌ {{username}} is not a citizen of this nation.
common.not_verified: ❌ You haven't verified your Roblox identity. Use `/vincular`.
common.rate_limited: ⏳ You're executing commands too fast. Wait {{seconds}} seconds.
common.feature_disabled: ❌ This feature is not enabled in this nation.
common.feature_locked: 🔒 This feature requires tier **{{tier}}** or higher. Your nation is **{{current_tier}}**.
setup.welcome: 🎉 Welcome to Bloxive! Your nation **{{nation_name}}** has been created.
setup.already_exists: ⚠️ This nation is already configured as **{{nation_name}}**.
setup.step1_description: Enter the name of your nation. This will be visible to everyone.
setup.step2_description: Define the name and symbol of your nation's currency.
setup.step3_description: Do you require Roblox identity verification for citizens?
setup.step4_description: How are entries to your nation managed?
setup.step5_description: Choose the economic mode for your nation.
setup.step6_description: Select channels for logs and notifications.
setup.step7_description: Review the configuration and confirm your nation's creation.
vincular.title: 🔗 Roblox Identity Verification
vincular.description: Link your Roblox account to access all Bloxive features.
vincular.expired: ❌ The verification link has expired. Run `/vincular` again.
perfil.title: 👤 Profile of {{username}}
perfil.not_citizen: You are not a citizen of this nation.
vincular.not_found: Code not found. **Important:** Roblox caches profiles for up to 5 minutes. If you just saved, please wait a few minutes and try again.
registro.title: 📋 Citizenship Registration
registro.success: ✅ Welcome to **{{nation_name}}**! Your citizen number is **{{citizen_number}}**.
registro.already_citizen: ⚠️ You're already a citizen of this nation with number **{{citizen_number}}**.
registro.border_closed: 🚫 This nation's borders are closed. No new citizens are accepted.
registro.application_pending: 📝 Your application has been submitted. An admin will review it soon.
registro.pps_too_low: 🚫 Your PPS ({{pps}}) doesn't meet the minimum requirement ({{min_pps}}).
registro.verification_required: ❌ This nation requires Roblox verification. Use `/vincular` first.
economy.insufficient_funds: ❌ Insufficient funds. You have **{{symbol}}{{balance}}** and need **{{symbol}}{{required}}**.
economy.self_transfer: ❌ You can't transfer money to yourself.
economy.zero_amount: ❌ Amount must be greater than zero.
balance.title: 💰 Balance of {{username}}
fine.insufficient_permissions: ❌ You don't have permission to fine citizens.
fine.target_not_citizen: ❌ {{username}} is not a citizen of this nation.
fine.requires_approval: ⚠️ This fine exceeds your limit of **{{symbol}}{{max_amount}}**. Request supervisor approval.
fine.rate_limited: ⏳ You've exceeded the hourly fine limit ({{max}}).
fine.immune_target: 🛡️ {{username}} has an immune role. Only an admin can fine them.
fine.as_debt: ⚠️ {{username}} has insufficient funds. The fine is recorded as debt.
arrest.already_arrested: ⚠️ {{username}} already has an active arrest. Case **{{case_number}}**.
arrest.insufficient_permissions: ❌ You don't have permission to arrest citizens.
arrest.immune_target: 🛡️ {{username}} has an immune role. Only an admin can arrest them.
arrest.bail_available: 💰 Bail available: **{{symbol}}{{amount}}**. The detainee can use `/bail`.
arrest.bonus: 💰 Arrest bonus: **{{symbol}}{{amount}}** transferred to your wallet.
release.insufficient_permissions: ❌ You don't have permission to release detainees.
warrant.insufficient_permissions: ❌ You don't have permission to issue warrants.
bail.not_arrested: ❌ You don't have an active arrest.
bail.not_enabled: ❌ The bail system is not enabled in this nation.
bail.insufficient_funds: ❌ You don't have enough funds for the bail of **{{symbol}}{{amount}}**.
passport.title: 🛂 Passport of {{username}}
passport.no_identity: ❌ This user doesn't have a Bloxive identity.
visa.already_has: ⚠️ {{username}} already has an active visa in this nation.
border.auto_entry_alliance: 🛂 Automatic entry granted by free transit treaty with **{{issuing_nation}}**.
border.auto_entry_pps: 🛂 Automatic entry by PPS above threshold ({{pps}}/{{threshold}}).
company.insufficient_funds: ❌ The company doesn't have sufficient funds.
company.max_employees: ❌ The company has reached the maximum employee limit ({{max}}).
company.not_owner: ❌ You're not the owner of this company.
company.no_permission: ❌ Your company role doesn't have permission for this action.
company.bureaucratic_only: ❌ In bureaucratic mode, only administrators can create companies.
job.full: ❌ This job has reached its position limit.
job.already_employed: ⚠️ You already have a job. Quit first with `/trabajo renunciar`.
alliance.already_exists: ⚠️ An active alliance already exists with **{{partner}}**.
alliance.max_reached: ❌ You've reached the alliance limit for your tier ({{max}}).
alliance.visitors_prompt: ⚠️ The alliance with **{{partner}}** ended. There are **{{count}}** visitors who entered through this alliance. What should we do?
sancion.not_issuer: ❌ Only the issuing nation can revoke this sanction.
sancion.conduct_description: ⚠️ **Conduct** sanctions affect the player's global identity and can be shared with allied nations.
sancion.lore_description: 📋 **Lore** sanctions are local to this nation and don't affect the player in other servers.
gobierno.runway_warning: ⚠️ **ALERT:** Treasury has only **{{days}} days** of runway.
prestige.title: 🏆 Prestige of {{nation_name}}
prestige.updated: 🏆 Your nation's prestige tier has been updated to **{{tier}}**.
dni.editor_locked: 🔒 The DNI editor requires **Gold** tier or higher.
help.title: 📖 Bloxive Help
help.description: Bloxive is a governance and economic simulation platform for roleplay servers.
